metadata.title: Magnetar dev | Home
metadata.description: Turnkey development of web applications on React or NextJS and backend on Python and FastAPI

p.text: I am a <pale_blue>full-stack</pale_blue> developer, specializing in creating modern web services and interactive bots. On the backend, I deploy APIs using <python>Python</python>, <fastapi>FastAPI</fastapi> and data validation through <pydantic>Pydantic</pydantic>. I create interfaces in <typescript>TypeScript</typescript> in conjunction with <reactjs>React</reactjs> / Next.js, paying attention to structured layout using the <bem_methodology>BEM methodology</bem_methodology> or speed of development with <tailwind>TailwindCSS</tailwind>. I develop functional bots and applications for <telegram>Telegram</telegram> and <discord>Discord</discord>.

Turnkey development: functional bots for Telegram and Discord, modern websites and Mini Apps on React/Next.js and Python. I work strictly according to your TOR, and for the frontend a ready-made layout (Figma) is required. I take on the entire cycle: from architecture design to server deployment.

For project discussion, write to Telegram.

description.text: Asynchronous Python library for Heleket crypto payments API.
Telegram bot for purchasing temporary subscription to a TG channel for stars and cryptocurrency.
Discord bot for processing orders on the server.
Website for purchasing donation on a Minecraft server.

Development of Telegram bots of any complexity turnkey. Integration with external APIs, connection of payment systems, automatic moderation and admin panels. I guarantee high performance and fault tolerance.
High-quality adaptive layout. Creation of responsive and clean interfaces using BEM methodology or TailwindCSS. The site will display perfectly on any screens.
Creation of modern web applications and Telegram Mini Apps (TMA). Full-stack development: from designing a fast backend on FastAPI to an optimized frontend on React/Next.js.
Creation of multifunctional Discord bots. Setting up automatic moderation, level systems, role issuance and custom interactive commands. Integration with services and stable 24/7 operation.
